meaning: n.官能,功能,作用,职责,典礼,仪式,[数]函数vi.(器官等)活动,运行,行使职责
examples: Breathing is an automatic function of the body.
This function allows you to cut and paste text.
This design aims for harmony of form and function.
Genomics studies the function of genes, the DNA instructions by which the body makes proteins.
The change is publicly accessible by a track-changes function on the ClinicalTrials.gov website.
